---
title: "Burns per coordinator"
format: html
---

```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
dashboardr::.page_config(accessibility = TRUE, inputs = TRUE, crosstab_prefix = "burns_per_coordinator")
```

```{r setup}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| results: 'hide'

# Load dashboardr (includes dplyr, highcharter as dependencies)
library(dashboardr)

# Global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  error = FALSE,
  fig.width = 12,
  fig.height = 8,
  dpi = 300
)

# Load data
data <- readRDS('dataset_small_76obs.rds')

# Data summary
cat('Dataset loaded:', nrow(data), 'rows,', ncol(data), 'columns\n')

# Create filtered datasets
# Each filter is applied once and reused across visualizations

data_filtered_c99ea918 <- dashboardr::.convert_haven(data) %>% dplyr::filter(period_trunc >= Sys.Date() - 7)
data_filtered_06cc0e68 <- dashboardr::.convert_haven(data) %>% dplyr::filter(period_trunc >= Sys.Date() - 30)

```


```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: 'asis'
dashboardr::render_input_row(list(
  list(
    input_id = "project_name",
    label = "Filter by project",
    type = "select_single",
    filter_var = "project_name",
    options = c("All", "FTAC Ghana"),
    options_from = NULL,
    default_selected = "All",
    placeholder = "Select...",
    width = "300px",
    min = 0,
    max = 100,
    step = 1,
    value = NULL,
    show_value = TRUE,
    inline = TRUE,
    stacked = FALSE,
    stacked_align = "center",
    group_align = "left",
    ncol = NULL,
    nrow = NULL,
    toggle_series = NULL,
    override = FALSE,
    labels = NULL,
    size = "md",
    help = NULL,
    disabled = FALSE,
    mt = NULL,
    mr = NULL,
    mb = NULL,
    ml = NULL,
    icons = NULL
  ),
  list(
    input_id = "approval_status",
    label = "Filter by status",
    type = "select_single",
    filter_var = "approval_status",
    options = c("All", "approved", "pending", "rejected"),
    options_from = NULL,
    default_selected = "All",
    placeholder = "Select...",
    width = "300px",
    min = 0,
    max = 100,
    step = 1,
    value = NULL,
    show_value = TRUE,
    inline = TRUE,
    stacked = FALSE,
    stacked_align = "center",
    group_align = "left",
    ncol = NULL,
    nrow = NULL,
    toggle_series = NULL,
    override = FALSE,
    labels = NULL,
    size = "md",
    help = NULL,
    disabled = FALSE,
    mt = NULL,
    mr = NULL,
    mb = NULL,
    ml = NULL,
    icons = NULL
  )
), style = "boxed", align = "center")
```

## Timeframe


::: {.panel-tabset}

### Last week

```{r timeframe-7}
# Last week
result <- viz_bar(
  data = data_filtered_c99ea918,
  title = "Last week",
  color_palette = NULL,
  weight_var = NULL,
  x_var = "entity_name",
  y_var = "survey_count",
  horizontal = TRUE,
  y_label = "Number of burns",
  x_label = "Coordinator",
  cross_tab_filter_vars = c("project_name", "approval_status")
)

result <- dashboardr:::.embed_cross_tab(result)

result
```


### Last month

```{r timeframe-8}
# Last month
result <- viz_bar(
  data = data_filtered_06cc0e68,
  title = "Last month",
  color_palette = NULL,
  weight_var = NULL,
  x_var = "entity_name",
  y_var = "survey_count",
  horizontal = TRUE,
  y_label = "Number of burns",
  x_label = "Coordinator",
  cross_tab_filter_vars = c("project_name", "approval_status")
)

result <- dashboardr:::.embed_cross_tab(result)

result
```


### All time

```{r timeframe-9}
# All time
result <- viz_timeline(
  data = data,
  title = "All time",
  color_palette = NULL,
  weight_var = NULL,
  group_var = "entity_name",
  y_var = "survey_count",
  time_var = "period_trunc",
  y_label = "Number of burns",
  x_label = "Week",
  agg = "sum",
  cross_tab_filter_vars = c("project_name", "approval_status")
)

result <- dashboardr:::.embed_cross_tab(result)

result
```


:::
